data: {"generalSituation":"The northeast monsoon will continue to bring slightly cooler weather to Guangdong tomorrow. Meanwhile, under the influence of upper-air disturbances, there will be showers over the region. With the upper-air disturbances departing and the northeast monsoon moderating, showers will ease off with temperatures rising progressively over the coast of southern China midweek this week. A trough of low pressure is expected to bring unsettled weather to southern China towards the weekend.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260505","week":"Tuesday","forecastWind":"East force 4 to 5, occasionally force 6 offshore and on high ground at first.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with occasional showers. Isolated thunderstorms at first. Slightly cooler.
